title: Fire danger warning with warm weather conditions today
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - The South African Weather Service has issued a weather warning for extremely high fire danger conditions on Tuesday 29 July.

Particularly over the Swellendam and Hessequa municipalities of the Western Cape.


> You can expect the following weather in your region today:


Western CapeCloudy in the west in the morning, otherwise partly cloudy and warm. Evening fog patches in the north-west.

The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh northerly to north-westerly. The expected UVB sunburn index: Moderate

Western half of the Eastern CapeFine and cool, but warm along the coast. The wind along the coast will be moderate northerly to north-westerly.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeFine and cool, but warm in the south-west. The wind along the coast will be moderate to fresh north-easterly.


> Expected temperatures on Tuesday:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
